"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "`melange update-cache` downloads URIs from build configs via `io.Copy` without any size limit or HTTP client timeout (`pkg/renovate/cache/cache.go`). An attacker-controlled URI in a melange config can cause unbounded disk writes, exhausting disk on the build runner. Affected versions <= 0.40.5.

**Fix:** Merged
**Acknowledgements**

Thank you to Oleh Konko from [1seal](https://1seal.org/) for discovering and reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00226, "percentile": 0.1327}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-02T22:04:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-29049"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-06T07:16:02Z", "published_at": "2026-03-02T22:04:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange/security/advisories/GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29049", "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange/pull/2379", "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange/commit/652ca5af08588f78e2d405e64b058fac8398d23f", "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange/releases/tag/v0.43.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/chainguard-dev/melange/security-advisories/GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/chainguard-dev/melange", "summary": "`melange update-cache` has unbounded HTTP download that can exhaust disk in CI", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T13:10:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7rp8-r62p-q6wc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.43.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "chainguard.dev/melange"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.43.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: `melange update-cache` has unbounded HTTP download that can exhaust disk in CI
